ope.reason: CRM learns a stochastic ask/recommend policy, but ReDial/INSPIRED logs do not contain behavior-policy propensities for CRM actions.

conversation_results.baseline_dialogue_note: CRM adapter learns an ask-facet/recommend policy; clarify/end are not explicit CRM actions.

transparency.baseline_explanation_note: Template explanation generated for comparable transparency fields; CRM itself is not a neural explanation generator.

online_rollout.baseline_note: CRM is a learned ask-facet/recommend policy baseline adapted to movie genres/categories.
